numactl --cpunodebind=0 --membind=0 qemu-system-x86_64 -machine q35,accel=kvm,mem-merge=off -cpu host -m 2048M -smp 8 -enable-kvm -display none -daemonize -pidfile /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_0/qemu.pid -D /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_0/qemu.log -drive if=none,file=/mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_0/root.img,format=raw,media=disk,id=drive0,cache=none,aio=native -device virtio-blk-pci,drive=drive0 -netdev user,id=net0,hostfwd=tcp:127.0.0.1:10022-:22 -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=net0 -device ivshmem-plain,memdev=ivshmem -object memory-backend-file,size=32768M,share=on,mem-path=/dev/shm/tigonkv,id=ivshmem -taskset 0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7
numactl --cpunodebind=0 --membind=0 qemu-system-x86_64 -machine q35,accel=kvm,mem-merge=off -cpu host -m 2048M -smp 8 -enable-kvm -display none -daemonize -pidfile /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_1/qemu.pid -D /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_1/qemu.log -drive if=none,file=/mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_1/root.img,format=raw,media=disk,id=drive0,cache=none,aio=native -device virtio-blk-pci,drive=drive0 -netdev user,id=net1,hostfwd=tcp:127.0.0.1:10023-:22 -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=net1 -device ivshmem-plain,memdev=ivshmem -object memory-backend-file,size=32768M,share=on,mem-path=/dev/shm/tigonkv,id=ivshmem -taskset 8,9,10,11,12,13,14,15
numactl --cpunodebind=0 --membind=0 qemu-system-x86_64 -machine q35,accel=kvm,mem-merge=off -cpu host -m 2048M -smp 8 -enable-kvm -display none -daemonize -pidfile /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_2/qemu.pid -D /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_2/qemu.log -drive if=none,file=/mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_2/root.img,format=raw,media=disk,id=drive0,cache=none,aio=native -device virtio-blk-pci,drive=drive0 -netdev user,id=net2,hostfwd=tcp:127.0.0.1:10024-:22 -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=net2 -device ivshmem-plain,memdev=ivshmem -object memory-backend-file,size=32768M,share=on,mem-path=/dev/shm/tigonkv,id=ivshmem -taskset 16,17,18,19,20,21,22,23
numactl --cpunodebind=0 --membind=0 qemu-system-x86_64 -machine q35,accel=kvm,mem-merge=off -cpu host -m 2048M -smp 8 -enable-kvm -display none -daemonize -pidfile /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_3/qemu.pid -D /mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_3/qemu.log -drive if=none,file=/mnt/xz_vm_storage/vm_3/root.img,format=raw,media=disk,id=drive0,cache=none,aio=native -device virtio-blk-pci,drive=drive0 -netdev user,id=net3,hostfwd=tcp:127.0.0.1:10025-:22 -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=net3 -device ivshmem-plain,memdev=ivshmem -object memory-backend-file,size=32768M,share=on,mem-path=/dev/shm/tigonkv,id=ivshmem -taskset 24,25,26,27,28,29,30,31
